movie.actors: John Ritter, Pam Dawber, Jeffrey Jones, David Tom
movie.plot: A husband and wife are sucked into a hellish television set and have to survive a gauntlet of twisted versions of shows they find themselves in.
movie.title: Stay Tuned
movie.writer: Tom S. Parker (screenplay), Jim Jennewein (screenplay), Tom S. Parker (story), Jim Jennewein (story), Richard Siegel (story)
